title: rubus ochraceus
intro: Rubus ochraceus, also known as the golden bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of tannins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus ochraceus include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate digestive issues, reduce oxidative stress, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
